title: The Surgical Confluence Reading Room

features.name: flooded archive table
features.desc-on-touch: Where surgical texts and ocean recordings share one reading surface, words bleeding into salt-stain margins. Two archives' alphabets learning each other.

features.name: tidal file-shore
features.desc-on-touch: Where files wash ashore with each tide, their edges weathered smooth. Procedure-steps and wave-recordings bundled together, indistinguishable.

features.name: confluence mirror
features.desc-on-touch: A pool where salt-water and surgical runoff meet, reflecting neither cleanly. The two archives see themselves mirrored and wrong in this threshold.

features.name: procedure-chamber interior
features.desc-on-touch: A reading room rendered as a surgical theater rendered as a flooded chamber. Each level of rendering seeps into the next. The space cannot decide what it holds.

features.name: salt-speech convergence
features.desc-on-touch: Where voices from the ocean (the archive itself) and surgical whispers (the contamination) arrive at the same moment and cannot be separated.

inscription: two archives meet where the beach accepts water that is not salt, and learns both alphabets

file.name: Beach_Procedure_Step_Seven_Flooded_Margins.txt
file.note: Surgical notation intermixed with tidal tables. The text reports that the operation took place in shallow water, or perhaps the ocean is learning to perform surgery. Authorship uncertain—ROOT or conta

exits.label: back up the strand toward the sorting shed where files still know their origins
deeper into the confluence where two worlds' currents swirl
along the beach where both salt and procedure fluid mark the sand
